name: Meepo
description: All these fancy knights and scary monsters. Pff! What do they got that I ain't got? Nothing, that's what.

abilities.name: Earthbind
abilities.description: Mega Meepo throws out multiple nets at the same time.

abilities.name: Poof
abilities.description: A Meepo can teleport to another Meepo or itself after its cast point, dealing damage in both the departure and arrival locations. Poof deals bonus damage corresponding to the amount of Meepo stacked.

abilities.name: Ransack
abilities.description: Steals health from the attacked enemy target per strike and heals all other Meepos for a fixed amount.

abilities.name: Dig
abilities.description: Dispels Meepo, becomes invulnerable and hidden shortly, while restoring its health.

abilities.name: Mega Meepo
abilities.description: Mega Meepo throws out multiple nets at the same time. Poof deals bonus damage corresponding to the amount of Meepo stacked.

abilities.name: Divided We Stand
abilities.description: Summons an imperfect, semi-autonomous duplicate of himself, which can gain gold and experience as he does

abilities.name: Clone Model
abilities.description: The Meepo Clones are treated as heroes in most cases with certain exceptions.
